skipped.message: Reason: distribution initializes with short validation error ('test-examples.R:145:9')
Reason: ggmosaic issue: will be resumed via the issue #925 in tmg ('test-shinytest2-tm_g_association.R:51:3')
Reason: ggmosaic issue: will be resumed via the issue ('test-shinytest2-tm_g_association.R:68:3')
Reason: ggmosaic issue: will be resumed via the issue ('test-shinytest2-tm_g_association.R:90:3')
Reason: ggmosaic issue: will be resumed via the issue ('test-shinytest2-tm_g_association.R:100:3')

testcase.name: tm_a_pca_module_creation_creates_a_module_with_valid_transformators

error.message: Error in `tm_a_pca(dat = spec, transformators = list(teal::teal_transform_module()))`: Assertion on 'transformators' failed: Must have names. ('test-tm_a_pca.R:17:5')

testcase.error: Error in `tm_a_pca(dat = spec, transformators = list(teal::teal_transform_module()))`: Assertion on 'transformators' failed: Must have names. Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─testthat::expect_s3_class(...) at test-tm_a_pca.R:17:5 2. │ └─testthat::quasi_label(enquo(object)) 3. │ └─rlang::eval_bare(expr, quo_get_env(quo)) 4. └─teal.modules.general::tm_a_pca(dat = spec, transformators = list(teal::teal_transform_module())) 5. └─teal.modules.general:::assert_decorators(transformators, available_decorators) 6. └─checkmate::makeAssertion(x, res, .var.name, add) 7. └─checkmate:::mstop(...)

testcase.name: tm_a_pca_input_validation_fails_when_transformators_has_invalid_object_types

failure.message: `tm_a_pca(dat = spec, transformators = list("not a teal_transform_module"))` threw an error with unexpected message. ('test-tm_a_pca.R:165:5')

testcase.failure: `tm_a_pca(dat = spec, transformators = list("not a teal_transform_module"))` threw an error with unexpected message. Expected match: "May only contain the following types: \\{teal_transform_module\\}" Actual message: "Assertion on 'transformators' failed: Must have names." Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─testthat::expect_error(...) at test-tm_a_pca.R:165:5 2. │ └─testthat:::quasi_capture(...) 3. │ ├─testthat (local) .capture(...) 4. │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 5. │ └─rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 6. └─teal.modules.general::tm_a_pca(dat = spec, transformators = list("not a teal_transform_module")) 7. └─teal.modules.general:::assert_decorators(transformators, available_decorators) 8. └─checkmate::makeAssertion(x, res, .var.name, add) 9. └─checkmate:::mstop(...)

testcase.name: tm_gtsummary_module_server_behavior_with_decorators_one_decorator_executes_successfully
testcase.error: <shiny.silent.error/validation/error/condition> Error: Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-tm_gtsummary.R:373:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. ├─testthat::expect_true(...) at test-tm_gtsummary.R:387:9 29. │ └─testthat::quasi_label(enquo(object), label) 30. │ └─rlang::eval_bare(expr, quo_get_env(quo)) 31. ├─base::endsWith(get_code(decorated_output_q()), "table") 32. ├─teal.code::get_code(decorated_output_q()) 33. │ └─teal.code::dev_suppress(object) 34. │ └─base::force(x) 35. ├─shiny (local) decorated_output_q() 36. │ └─base::stop(.value) 37. └─shiny (local) `<fn>`(`<shny.sl.>`)

testcase.name: Module_with_decorators_Multiple_decorators_execute_successfully

error.message: Error in `srv_transform_teal_data("inner", data = data, transformators = decorators)`: Assertion on 'transformators' failed: May only contain the following types: {teal_transform_module}, but element 1 has type 'list'. ('test-utils.R:189:5')

testcase.error: Error in `srv_transform_teal_data("inner", data = data, transformators = decorators)`: Assertion on 'transformators' failed: May only contain the following types: {teal_transform_module}, but element 1 has type 'list'. Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-utils.R:189:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(session, rlang::exec(app, !!!args)) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ ├─rlang::exec(app, !!!args) 28. │ └─teal.modules.general (local) `<fn>`(...) 29. │ └─shiny::moduleServer(...) 30. │ ├─session$setReturned(callModule(module, id, session = session)) 31. │ └─shiny::callModule(module, id, session = session) 32. │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 33. │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 34. │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 35. │ │ └─base::force(expr) 36. │ └─teal.modules.general (local) module(childScope$input, childScope$output, childScope, ...) 37. │ └─teal.modules.general:::srv_decorate_teal_data(...) 38. │ └─shiny::moduleServer(...) 39. │ └─shiny::callModule(module, id, session = session) 40. │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 41. │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 42. │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 43. │ │ └─base::force(expr) 44. │ └─teal.modules.general (local) module(childScope$input, childScope$output, childScope, ...) 45. │ └─teal::srv_transform_teal_data("inner", data = data, transformators = decorators) 46. │ └─checkmate::assert_list(...) 47. │ └─checkmate::makeAssertion(x, res, .var.name, add) 48. │ └─checkmate:::mstop(...) 49. │ └─base::stop(simpleError(sprintf(msg, ...), call.)) 50. └─shiny (local) `<fn>`(`<smplErrr>`)

testcase.name: Module_with_decorators_Default_and_multiple_decorators_to_one_object_execute_successfully

error.message: Error in `srv_transform_teal_data("inner", data = data, transformators = decorators)`: Assertion on 'transformators' failed: May only contain the following types: {teal_transform_module}, but element 1 has type 'list'. ('test-utils.R:220:5')

testcase.error: Error in `srv_transform_teal_data("inner", data = data, transformators = decorators)`: Assertion on 'transformators' failed: May only contain the following types: {teal_transform_module}, but element 1 has type 'list'. (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ ├─rlang::exec(app, !!!args) 28. │ └─teal.modules.general (local) `<fn>`(...) 29. │ └─shiny::moduleServer(...) 30. │ ├─session$setReturned(callModule(module, id, session = session)) 31. │ └─shiny::callModule(module, id, session = session) 32. │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 33. │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 42. │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 43. │ │ └─base::force(expr) 44. │ └─teal.modules.general (local) module(childScope$input, childScope$output, childScope, ...) 45. │ └─teal::srv_transform_teal_data("inner", data = data, transformators = decorators) 46. │ └─checkmate::assert_list(...) 47. │ └─checkmate::makeAssertion(x, res, .var.name, add) 48. │ └─checkmate:::mstop(...) 49. │ └─base::stop(simpleError(sprintf(msg, ...), call.)) 50. └─shiny (local) `<fn>`(`<smplErrr>`)
